originalTitle: Weight-loss treatments boom as Kenyan attitudes to beauty change
title: Weight-loss treatments boom as Kenyan attitudes to beauty change
content: Kenyan celebrities are driving a surge in weight‑loss and cosmetic procedures, sparking criticism and concerns.

originalTitle: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
title: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
content: Flights in and out of Nairobi Airport have been disrupted while some roads in the capital are submerged.

originalTitle: 'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC
title: 'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC
content: Suspected Islamist militants reportedly seized control of a village for two days before being forced out by troops and air strikes.

originalTitle: Marches for International Women’s Day denounce war, abuse and oppression
title: Marches for International Women’s Day denounce war, abuse and oppression
content: Marches on 115th anniversary of IWD place focus on issues like US-Israeli war on Iran and Trump's links with Epstein.

originalTitle: Colombia elects Congress, chooses presidential candidates amid US tensions
title: Colombia elects Congress, chooses presidential candidates amid US tensions
content: Colombians will choose from more than 3,000 candidates vying for 102 Senate seats and 182 House seats.

originalTitle: Thousands flee Akobo after South Sudan army issues forced evacuation order
title: Thousands flee Akobo after South Sudan army issues forced evacuation order
content: Army tells UN and aid workers to leave as forces close in on one of the last opposition strongholds.

originalTitle: War fuels debate in Cyprus over UK military bases
title: War fuels debate in Cyprus over UK military bases
content: “British Bases Out” is the slogan of Cypriot protesters after a drone strike targeted the RAF Akrotiri airbase.

originalTitle: Explosion at US embassy in Oslo may have been terrorism, Norway police say
title: Explosion at US embassy in Oslo may have been terrorism, Norway police say
content: Police say they are investigating other motives after the blast caused minor damage to the embassy building.

originalTitle: Boy, 12, among six dead as tornadoes hit Michigan and Oklahoma
title: Boy, 12, among six dead as tornadoes hit Michigan and Oklahoma
content: The storms uprooted trees, downed power lines, damaged buildings and ripped the roofs off some houses.

originalTitle: 'Disgraceful scenes as toxicity spills over in Old Firm cup tie'
title: 'Disgraceful scenes as toxicity spills over in Old Firm cup tie'
content: As if the ugliness of the 120 minutes wasn't enough there was disgrace as Rangers and Celtic fans invaded the pitch at Ibrox, writes Tom English.

originalTitle: Bottom of the league, magic in the cup - Port Vale's 'incredible' run
title: Bottom of the league, magic in the cup - Port Vale's 'incredible' run
content: Port Vale are bottom of League One, but they have reached the FA Cup quarter-finals for only the second time in their history.

originalTitle: 'Shameful' pitch invasion by Celtic and Rangers fans condemned by police
title: 'Shameful' pitch invasion by Celtic and Rangers fans condemned by police
content: Arrests were made with both police officers and fans injured during clashes following Celtic's 4-2 win on penalties.
